alkylation reagent: the addition of 5 μL iodoacetamide (1M) was carried out
cleavage agent: incubated with Trypsin Gold (cat#V5280, Promega™, Madison, WI, USA) mass spectrometry grade
collision energy: at a normalized collision energy of 35%
instrument: mass spectroscopy system (Thermo Scientific, LTQ Orbitrap velos pro ETD)
ionization type: where the electrospray ionization (ESI) source ionized them at 2 kV
labeling: Peptides prepared from in-solution digestion were analyzed by a nano-LC system
